content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with NIFTY +0.23%, Bank Nifty +0.80%, Pharma leading at +1.54%, PSU Banks +1.02%. India VIX cooling -2.18% to 17.52. Global cues supportive with US markets up ~1%. Multiple Q4 earnings beats driving sector rotation into autos, IT (Coforge), capital goods (Titagarh, GRSE), and financials (ABCAPITAL, BANDHANBNK).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD with current SL — already raised to 1035 (above breakeven 984), gap to CMP 1053 is ~1.7% which respects the 1% trail-floor. Position +6.3%, thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Target 1110 still ~5% away. No-op modify avoided — keeping stored values."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -1.1% within tolerance. SL 119 has ~3.8% gap. Hold as VIX hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, SL already at 1715 (above entry 1700, breakeven+). CMP 1729, gap to SL is ~0.8% — already tight. Per trail-gap rule (1% min below LTP), should NOT tighten further. Holding stored SL/target — no-op modify, treat as HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, SL 206 (~0.8% below CMP 207.68). Bank rallied to 52w-high 210.63 intraday and faded — participation confirmed but profit-taking visible. Q4 thesis (PAT +68%, NIM expansion) intact. SL gap already <1% — leaving alone, will not tighten further."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9% (entry 4575, CMP 4656.50). Trail SL up from 4575 to 4595 (breakeven+0.4%). Gap to CMP ~1.3%, respects trail-floor. Defence rally intact, new CMD catalyst, Q4 results upcoming mid-May. Risk now capped to ~+0.4% locked-in vs target 4875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.8%, SL 1420 has ~1.2% room. Q4 results were strong (PAT +124% YoY, net-debt negative) but stock faded from intraday high 1472 → 1437. Realty index weak. Holding to SL or recovery — thesis not broken yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1%, SL already at 6950 (breakeven+0.7%). CMP 7052, gap ~1.4% — at trail-floor minimum. No-op modify, keeping stored values. Strong Q4 (PAT +124%, EBITDA margin 34.2%), pledge released, momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7% but stock hit intraday high 862.70 (+8.4% day). Heavy volume, Jefferies Buy initiation, order book Rs 13,955 cr. SL 820 has ~1.7% gap. Faded from high — wait for consolidation. Not trailing yet as entry barely above breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.2%, hit 52w-high 372.50 today on Q4 print (PAT +31%). SL 358 has 3% room. Thesis fresh — let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8% (entry 820, CMP 824.85). Stock hit 843 intraday high (52w-high break), faded back. Trail SL from 805 to 815 (-1.2% from CMP, respects floor). Locks in -0.6% max loss vs target 855. Tighten as 52w-high breakout requires immediate confirmation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%, hit intraday high 3315 then faded. Q4 print exceptional (PAT +42%, FY26 record). SL 3245 has ~1% room. Auto sector rally intact. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%, CMP 1267.90 from entry 1259. SL 1215 has ~4.2% room. Day's high 1295 faded — typical post-earnings volatility. Q4 revenue +30%, PAT +91%. Hold for thesis to play."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 8.27% intraday after Q4 beat. Already hold HAL + TITAGARH in capital goods/defence cluster — adding GRSE would create 3-name defence/cap-goods cluster concentration. Skip per cluster discipline rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already hold PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + BANDHANBNK in financials cluster. Adding 4th financial name violates cluster discipline. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NEULANDLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results scheduled May 12 (4 trading sessions away — borderline binary event window). Pre-event entry at 52w-high zone with P/E 70 leaves no room for a miss. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PNB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Banking cluster already 3-name heavy. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52w-high after +7% spike, valid metals theme but book is already ~65% deployed with multiple post-earnings winners. Preserve cash for higher-conviction setups."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1035 (+5.2% above entry, locks in 5.2% gain). CMP 1053, gap 1.7% respects floor. No further tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, within noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already at breakeven+0.9%. Gap to CMP 1729 is <1% — at floor. Cannot tighten without inviting self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.8%, SL gap <1% already. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 4575 → 4595 (breakeven+, gap to CMP 1.3%)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Loss -2.8%, SL 1420 has 1.2% room. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "reasoning": "Already at breakeven+. Gap 1.4% at floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position barely above entry, faded from intraday high. Not trailing yet."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh position, let thesis play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 805 → 815 (-1.2% below CMP). Locks in near-breakeven on 52w-high break."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Faded from high but thesis intact, SL has 1% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh post-earnings position, SL has 4% absorption budget."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRSE, CHOLAHLDNG, VEDL, PNB, NEULANDLAB on watch. Re-examine if cluster concentration eases or if these consolidate after current spikes. NEULANDLAB results May 12 — re-assess post-results. HFCL pending BUY at 133.50 (placed earlier) — leave alone, thesis (telecom infra + 52w-high proximity) intact.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed with 12 CNC names — diversified across financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL), capital goods/defence (HAL, TITAGARH), chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), auto (M&M), IT (COFORGE), realty (SOBHA), FMCG (MARICO), services (ADANIPORTS), commodity-hedge (GOLDBEES). Today's tick is primarily about trailing SLs on winners (HAL, MARICO breakouts) and refusing cluster-stack temptations (GRSE, CHOLAHLDNG, PNB). 5-day win rate 17% concerning — many recent positions still in incubation. Net positive +5,399 cumulative; capital preserved. No new entries today is the right call given dense earnings calendar and cluster saturation."
}
